meta.title: Nostr WoT Extension - Identität, Signer & Lightning-Wallet
meta.description: Die All-in-One-Nostr-Browsererweiterung. NIP-07-Identitätsanbieter, verschlüsselter Schlüsseltresor, integrierte Lightning-Wallet sowie Verwaltung von Profil, Relays und Mute-Liste für jeden Client.

hero.title: Identität. Signer. Wallet.
hero.description: Die All-in-One-Nostr-Erweiterung — verwalte deine Identität, signiere Events für jeden Client, sende Zaps mit einer integrierten Lightning-Wallet und halte Profil, Relays und Mute-Liste synchron.

capabilities.title: Everything You Need in One Extension
capabilities.description: Four pillars that make Nostr usable, trustworthy, and connected.

identity.title: Identity Provider
identity.description: NIP-07 signer, encrypted vault, multi-account management, and granular permissions for every Nostr client.

wallet.title: Lightning Wallet
wallet.description: Built-in wallet for zaps — connect via NWC, LNbits, or create one in a click. WebLN provider included.

profile.title: Profil & Relays
profile.description: Bearbeite dein kind:0-Profil, verwalte deine NIP-65-Relay-Liste und pflege deine NIP-51-Mute-Liste — alles an einem Ort, über alle Clients synchronisiert.

upcoming.title: Coming Soon
upcoming.description: Trust assertions and services integration — verifiable endorsements and trusted service discovery on Nostr.

identity.title: Your Keys, Your Identity
identity.description: A complete Nostr identity provider that works with every client. Create accounts, sign events, encrypt messages, and control permissions — all secured in an encrypted vault.

signer.title: NIP-07 signer & encryption
signer.description: Sign events, encrypt and decrypt messages (NIP-04 & NIP-44) for any Nostr client via the standard window.nostr API

multiAccount.title: Multi-account management
multiAccount.description: Multiple accounts with HD derivation, watch-only mode, and NIP-46 remote signer (Bunker) support

vault.title: Encrypted vault & auto-lock
vault.description: AES-256-GCM encrypted key storage with PBKDF2, configurable auto-lock timer, and secure key backup & export

permissions.title: Granular permissions
permissions.description: Per-account, per-domain, per-method permission controls with activity logging — you decide what each site can do

wallet.title: Zap Directly from the Extension
wallet.description: A built-in Lightning wallet that lets you send and receive zaps without leaving your Nostr client. Connect your own wallet or get started in seconds.

nwc.title: Nostr Wallet Connect (NWC)
nwc.description: Connect any NWC-compatible wallet — Alby, Mutiny, or your own Lightning node

lnbits.title: LNbits integration
lnbits.description: Use an existing LNbits instance or set one up for custodial wallet access

quickSetup.title: One-click wallet setup
quickSetup.description: No wallet yet? Create one instantly with the quick setup option — zero configuration needed

webln.title: WebLN provider
webln.description: Nostr apps can request payments directly through the extension — seamless zap experience across all clients

profile.title: Dein Profil, deine Relays & Mutes
profile.description: Halte deine Nostr-Präsenz direkt aus der Erweiterung in Ordnung. Bearbeite deine Profildaten, verwalte die Relays, an die du veröffentlichst und von denen du liest, und pflege deine Mute-Liste — ganz ohne zusätzlichen Client.

metadata.title: Profildaten (kind:0)
metadata.description: Aktualisiere Name, Bild, Bio und weitere kind:0-Daten und veröffentliche sie mit einem Klick an deine Relays

relays.title: Relay-Verwaltung (NIP-65)
relays.description: Pflege deine NIP-65-Relay-Liste — die Lese- und Schreib-Relays, über die jeder Client deine Notizen findet und veröffentlicht

mutes.title: Mute-Liste (NIP-51)
mutes.description: Erstelle und bearbeite deine NIP-51-Mute-Liste, damit ausgeblendete Accounts und Wörter überall verborgen bleiben

sync.title: Über alle Clients synchron
sync.description: Dein Profil, deine Relays und Mutes leben auf Nostr — einmal festgelegt, übernimmt sie jeder Client, den du nutzt

upcoming.title: The Future of Trust on Nostr
upcoming.description: We're building the next layer of decentralized trust — moving beyond follows to verifiable endorsements and trusted service discovery.

assertions.title: Trust Assertions
assertions.description: Go beyond binary follow/unfollow. Make explicit, typed trust statements — "I trust this developer", "I vouch for this merchant", "This relay operator is reliable". Assertions create richer, contextual trust signals stored as Nostr events, enabling nuanced reputation that the follow graph alone can't capture.

features.typed: Typed trust — endorse people for specific skills, roles, or domains
features.contextual: Contextual reputation — different trust for different situations
features.verifiable: Verifiable endorsements — cryptographically signed and publicly auditable
features.aggregated: Aggregated scores — combine assertions from your network for weighted trust

services.title: Services Integration
services.description: Connect the trust graph to real-world services. Discover trusted merchants, verified service providers, and reputable marketplaces — all filtered through your Web of Trust. Services can leverage trust assertions to verify providers and filter bad actors before you ever interact.

features.discovery: Trusted service discovery — find merchants and providers vouched by your network
features.verification: Provider verification — trust assertions as proof of reputation
features.marketplaces: Marketplace integration — WoT-filtered listings and seller reputation
features.ecosystem: Open ecosystem — any Nostr service can plug into the trust layer

howItWorks.title: Get Started in Minutes
howItWorks.description: Three steps to a complete Nostr identity with built-in trust and payments.

step1.title: Install the Extension
step1.description: Add to Chrome, Brave, Edge, Opera, or Firefox. Create a new account, import your keys, or connect a remote signer.

step2.title: Use Any Nostr Client
step2.description: Die Erweiterung stellt jeder Nostr-App automatisch NIP-07-Signierung und eine integrierte Lightning-Wallet bereit.

step3.title: Alles folgt dir
step3.description: Deine Identität, Wallet, Profil, Relays und Mutes begleiten dich über jeden Client hinweg — eine Erweiterung, überall.

howItWorks.learnMoreLink: Mehr darüber, wie die Erweiterung funktioniert

developers.title: For Developers
developers.description: Integrate trust into your app with our SDK, or self-host the Oracle for backend queries.

oracle.title: WoT Oracle
oracle.description: High-performance Rust backend indexing the entire Nostr follow graph. Sub-millisecond queries, 10K+ req/s, self-hostable.

sdk.title: nostr-wot-sdk
sdk.description: Extension-first design with Oracle fallback. Full TypeScript support and React hooks included.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about the Nostr WoT Extension.

whatIsExtension.question: What does the extension do?
whatIsExtension.answer: Die Nostr WoT Extension ist eine All-in-One-Browsererweiterung, die als dein Nostr-Identitätsanbieter (NIP-07-Signer) und deine Lightning-Wallet dient. Sie verwaltet deine Schlüssel in einem verschlüsselten Tresor, signiert Events für jeden Nostr-Client, wickelt Zaps ab und lässt dich dein Profil, deine Relays und deine Mute-Liste bearbeiten — alles aus einer einzigen Erweiterung.

whatDoesItManage.question: Was kann ich über die Erweiterung verwalten?
whatDoesItManage.answer: Deine gesamte Nostr-Identität: mehrere Accounts in einem verschlüsselten Tresor, Signierberechtigungen pro Seite, eine integrierte Lightning-Wallet, deine kind:0-Profildaten, deine NIP-65-Relay-Liste und deine NIP-51-Mute-Liste. Einmal festgelegt, übernimmt sie jeder Client, den du nutzt.

howDoesWalletWork.question: How does the Lightning wallet work?
howDoesWalletWork.answer: The extension includes a built-in Lightning wallet for sending and receiving zaps. Connect your own wallet via Nostr Wallet Connect (NWC), use an LNbits instance, or create one instantly with the quick setup option. It also provides a WebLN provider so Nostr apps can request payments directly.

isItPrivate.question: Is my data private?
isItPrivate.answer: Ja. Deine Schlüssel liegen in einem AES-256-GCM-verschlüsselten Tresor, den nur du entsperren kannst, und sie verlassen dein Gerät niemals unverschlüsselt. Du erteilst Signierzugriff pro Seite und pro Methode, sodass du immer genau kontrollierst, was jede Nostr-App mit deiner Identität tun darf.

whichBrowsers.question: Which browsers are supported?
whichBrowsers.answer: The extension works on Chrome, Brave, Edge, Opera, and Firefox. Safari support is coming soon.

whatAreTrustAssertions.question: What are trust assertions?
whatAreTrustAssertions.answer: Trust assertions are an upcoming feature that lets you make explicit, typed trust statements about other users — beyond just following them. For example, endorsing someone as a trusted developer or vouching for a merchant. These cryptographically signed statements create richer, contextual reputation on Nostr.

isFree.question: Is it free?
isFree.answer: Yes, completely free and open source under the MIT license. The extension, SDK, Oracle, and all source code are available on GitHub.

playground.title: Try the Playground
playground.description: Erkunde deinen Web of Trust-Graphen interaktiv. Sieh dir deine sozialen Verbindungen, Vertrauensdistanzen und an, wie Oracle und SDK sie in Echtzeit berechnen.

notice.title: Install from Chrome Web Store
notice.description: The extension is now available on the Chrome Web Store for easy installation:

steps.step2: Go to chrome://extensions in your browser

notice.note: No build required - the extension loads directly from source.

cta.title: Ready to Take Control?
cta.description: Your identity, your wallet, your trust network — all in one extension. Join the growing Nostr ecosystem today.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.description: Get the latest on new features, trust assertions, and services integration as they ship.
newsletter.success: Thanks for subscribing! We'll keep you updated.
